import React from 'react'; import { useTheme } from '../../contexts/ThemeContext'; import './QuizResults.css'; const QuizResults = ({ results }) => { const { theme } = useTheme(); return (

Your Career Match Results

Compatibility Score: {results.score}%

Recommended Careers

{results.careers.map((career, index) => (

{career}

Based on your interests and skills

))}

Recommended Courses

{results.courses.map((course, index) => (

{course.name}

Platform: {course.platform}

View Course
))}
); }; export default QuizResults;
